user.title: Configure Camera Object Detector
user.description: Configure object detection from a camera

error.api_key_required: API Key required for Moondream AI
API Key required for Moondream AI

detect_object.name: Detect Object
detect_object.description: Detect an object in a camera image on-demand

camera_entity.name: Camera
camera_entity.description: Camera entity to get the image from

detection_object.name: Object to Detect
detection_object.description: Name of the object to detect (e.g., 'drying_rack', 'person', 'car')

ai_service.name: AI Service
ai_service.description: AI service to use (optional, uses default if not specified)

api_key.name: API Key
api_key.description: API key for the AI service (optional, uses default if not specified)

no_ai_service.message: Integration not configured. Please configure Camera Object Detector via UI (Settings > Devices & Services) or specify 'ai_service' and 'api_key' in the service call

image_fetch_failed.message: Failed to get image from camera
